name: Brass: Birmingham
description: Brass: Birmingham is Martin Wallace, Gavan Brown, and Matt Tolman's Industrial-Revolution masterpiece — perennially top of BoardGameGeek's all-time rankings. Build a network of cotton mills, iron works, breweries, manufactories, and coal mines across the West Midlands; ship goods along canals in the Canal Era and rails in the Rail Era; manage tightening loans and rival flips. A heavy euro at the absolute peak of the form.
